title: juncus articulatus f. natans
intro: Juncus articulatus f. natans, also known as floating rush or water rush, is a floating aquatic plant species that belongs to the genus Juncus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Juncus articulatus f. natans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and it can also be used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations.
